data.read: Matches the small c4_test input family observed in the Ascend comparison logs, not a synthetic/random-data run.

torchtitan_models_common_mori_aiter_moe_: Added compact xgrad path to avoid materializing full padded dX slabs.
Added direct chunked dTopkWeight computation from padded expert output, avoiding out_padded -> compact full gather.
Added streamed SwiGLU W1/W3 backward helper that computes dgate/dup per expert row chunk, accumulates dw1/dw3, computes xgrad, and scatters dX without full padded dgate/dup tensors.
Applied streamed SwiGLU W1/W3 path to normal padded VJP, padded_saved VJP, and dx_first VJP.
launcher: Added passthrough and log reporting for CANARY_MORI_AITER_XGRAD_MODE.
Added passthrough and log reporting for CANARY_MORI_AITER_XGRAD_PADDED_LIMIT_GIB.
Added passthrough and log reporting for CANARY_MORI_AITER_DTOPK_CHUNK_ROWS.
Added passthrough and log reporting for CANARY_MORI_AITER_SWIGLU_CHUNK_ROWS.

pre_fix_oom_ladder.progress: step 1 completed at about 85.5 TFLOPs/GPU with about 203 GiB logged
pre_fix_oom_ladder.failure: rank 2 OOM in MORI routed MoE VJP torch.bmm(dgate, w1_local)

pre_fix_oom_ladder.progress: step 2 completed at about 176.00 TFLOPs/GPU but grad_norm was nan
pre_fix_oom_ladder.failure: OOM while gathering out_padded to compact for dTopkWeight

pre_fix_oom_ladder.progress: step 2 completed at about 177.25 TFLOPs/GPU but grad_norm was nan
pre_fix_oom_ladder.failure: OOM in direct dTopkWeight product/sum chunk before row chunking

pre_fix_oom_ladder.progress: step 2 completed at about 177.19 TFLOPs/GPU but grad_norm was nan
pre_fix_oom_ladder.failure: OOM in _triton_swiglu_backward at full padded dup allocation
MORI static SHMEM heap exhaustion at default 4 GiB heap during dispatch/combine setup

read.what_is_fixed: The MBS4/GBS128/GA8 no-activation-checkpoint MORI path no longer OOMs in the routed local VJP. The immediate blockers were full padded dX, compact dTopk gather, full dTopk product, full padded SwiGLU dgate/dup, and MORI default heap size.
read.what_is_not_fixed: This is not yet the final optimized MORI backward kernel. The streamed SwiGLU path trades memory for more per-expert chunk work, and late-step 4-6 throughput is about 147 TFLOPs/GPU, still below the 277 TFLOPs/GPU target.
read.next_action: Profile the streamed MORI VJP late steps to see whether the new wall is chunked SwiGLU/W1-W3 wgrad/xgrad launch overhead, MORI combine wait/skew, or remaining dense/loss wrapper work.
